summary: Caller hears silence after IVR handoff to AI agent
digest: Caller reached the AI agent in PROD; the agent played its greeting and the caller replied, but after the caller's first utterance the call went silent until the caller hung up at ~71 seconds. Original report blamed the IVR handoff; a follow-up comment corrected this to a failure after the first user turn.
acceptance_signals: Caller receives a spoken response after their first utterance
